# LabLink

> Egypt's smart dental lab marketplace - connecting dentists with verified dental labs to submit cases, compare quotes, and track every order in real time.

LabLink is a workflow platform that replaces chaotic WhatsApp-driven lab orders with a transparent, trackable system for dentists, dental labs, and admins. It supports the full lifecycle: case submission, lab matching and bidding, real-time status tracking, in-app chat, deliveries, invoicing, and payments - with bilingual (English/Arabic) and PWA support.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview of LabLink for dentists and dental labs.
- [How it works](/how-it-works): Step-by-step walkthrough of the order flow.
- [Browse labs](/labs): Directory of verified dental labs with ratings and specializations.
- [Subscription plans](/plans): Available pricing tiers for doctors and labs.
- [About](/about): Mission and values behind LabLink.
- [Contact](/contact): Reach the LabLink support team.
- [Sign in / Sign up](/auth): Account access for dentists and lab staff.
- [Install app](/install): Install LabLink as a PWA on mobile or desktop.

## Optional

- [Privacy policy](/privacy): How user data is handled.
- [Terms of service](/terms): Terms governing use of the platform.
